zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Vinton於1561年出生時，他的父親Sir Thomas II Vinton31歲，母親Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton31歲。他於1589年12月2日與Joan Sharpe在英國艾可法爾納姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1639年享年78歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Vinton于1561年出生时，他的父亲Sir Thomas II Vinton31岁，母亲Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton31岁。他于1589年12月2日与Joan Sharpe在英国艾可法爾納姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1639年享年78岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Vinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Finton   with voicing of the initial consonant (see   Fenton  ). In Sussex and Kent the name was probably confused with   Winton  .

variants.name: Finton
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fenton  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Vinton was born in 1561, his father, Sir Thomas II Vinton, was 31 and his mother, Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton, was 31. He married Joan Sharpe on 2 December 1589, in Farnham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1639, at the age of 78, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Vinton est né en 1561, son père, Sir Thomas II Vinton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan Sharpe le 2 décembre 1589, à Farnham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1639, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Vinton 1561 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas II Vinton 31 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton 31. Er hat am 2. Dezember 1589 in Farnham, Essex, England Joan Sharpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1639 im Alter von 78 Jahren und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Vinton è nato il nel 1561, il suo padre, Sir Thomas II Vinton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Joan Sharpe il 2 dicembre 1589, nel Farnham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1639, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Vintonが1561年に生まれた時，父Sir Thomas II Vintonは31歳，母Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vintonは31歳であった。1589年12月2日にイギリスエセックスファルンハムでJoan Sharpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年に78歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Vinton(이)가 1561년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas II Vinton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1589년 12월 2일 영국 에세스 패른함에서 Joan Sharpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1639년 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Vinton nasceu em 1561, seu pai, Sir Thomas II Vinton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Sharpe em 2 de dezembro de 1589, em Farnham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1639, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.Scituate, Plymouth, British Colonial Ame: сситуэит, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Vinton родился в 1561 г., его отцу по имени Sir Thomas II Vinton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Sharpe 2 декабря 1589 г. в местности фарнам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1639 г. в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.
